name: Hot Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
This hot fudge cake recipe really satisfies my chocolate craving, too. It is very sweet however.
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour, sugar, 2 tablespoons cocoa, baking powder and salt.
2. Stir in the milk and vanilla until smooth.
3. Spread batter in an ungreased 9-inch square baking pan.
4. Combine brown sugar and remaining cocoa; sprinkle over batter.
5. Pour hot water over all. Do not stir.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 35-40 minutes.
7. Serve warm. I like to serve it with frozen non-fat vanilla yogurt.
